headlines.title: Dangerous baby-sleep advice given to parents by self-described experts, secret filming reveals
headlines.description: The advice puts babies at risk of serious harm, even death, medical professionals have told the BBC.

headlines.title: Antisemitism 'a crisis for all of us', Starmer to say at Downing Street summit
headlines.description: The prime minister promises to tackle "malign threats" at a Downing Street summit focused on antisemitism.

headlines.title: Beyoncé, Rihanna and Heidi Klum turn heads at the Met Gala
headlines.description: The theme for 2026 Met Gala fundraiser is "Costume Art", exploring fashion as an embodied art form.

headlines.title: Poverty and technology leading to record levels of slavery in UK
headlines.description: An independent report warns cost of living pressures are driving up exploitation levels in Britain.

headlines.title: Second hantavirus case confirmed after three die in suspected cruise ship outbreak
headlines.description: The operator of the MV Hondius ship says a Dutch couple and a German national have died.

headlines.title: Dolly Parton cancels Las Vegas residency over health issues
headlines.description: The 80-year-old country music star said it will take some time for her to be "stage-performance ready" again.

headlines.title: Counter-terror police investigating arson at disused synagogue
headlines.description: The fire broke out at the former East London Central Synagogue on Tuesday morning.

headlines.title: Record 1.3m apply for 2027 London Marathon ballot
headlines.description: More than 1.3 million people have applied for next year's event which takes place on 25 April.

headlines.title: Potholes fuel voter frustration before elections - so what can be done?
headlines.description: The state of the roads will be at the top of many voters' agenda at this week's local elections in England.

headlines.title: Man, 25, dies after Brixton drive-by shooting
headlines.description: Keanu Taylor, 25, dies in hospital after shots were fired on Coldharbour Lane on Saturday.

headlines.title: Explosion at China fireworks factory kills 26 people
headlines.description: A blast at a fireworks factory in Hunan province has killed 26 people and injured 61, state media report.

headlines.title: 'We won't see her because she's Asian': How Lea Salonga fought to be seen on Broadway
headlines.description: Broadway icon and Disney princess Lea Salonga has paved the way for Asian actors - but it hasn't been easy.

headlines.title: The Papers: 'Rivals circle Starmer' and bid to reopen Hormuz pushes region 'to the brink'
headlines.description: Several of the papers focus on Sir Keir Starmer's leadership of the Labour party.

headlines.title: What we know about Trump's 'Project Freedom' in Strait of Hormuz
headlines.description: What does the operation entail and could it lead to a resumption of hostilities?

headlines.title: What is the hantavirus that has been confirmed on an Atlantic cruise ship?
headlines.description: While rare, the disease can be transmitted to humans through inhalation of airborne particles from dried rodent droppings.

headlines.title: 'His life was destroyed': Widow of man falsely accused of murder fights for an inquiry
headlines.description: Sapna Mukherjee said her husband Sougat's life was "irreversibly destroyed" after he was labelled a suspect.

headlines.title: Blake Lively and Justin Baldoni settle lawsuit over It Ends With Us film
headlines.description: The settlement comes just ahead of a trial slated to begin in May, where both stars were expected to testify.

headlines.title: Two killed and many injured after car driven into crowd in German city of Leipzig
headlines.description: A 33-year-old German citizen was detained following the incident, the authorities say.

headlines.title: British pubs closing at a rate of almost two per day in 2026
headlines.description: The British Beer and Pub Association says 161 pubs have closed in the first three months of this year.

headlines.title: Popular Australian author pleads guilty over child exploitation material
headlines.description: The Jasper Jones and Runt author was arrested in January during a police raid at his Perth home.

headlines.title: Two arrested over arson attack at Golders Green memorial
headlines.description: A memorial wall was damaged by fire on 27 April in north London, with counter-terror police involved in the investigation.

headlines.title: BBC News app
headlines.description: Top stories, breaking news, live reporting, and follow news topics that match your interests

headlines.title: The Week: The Price Of The Iran War
headlines.description: Could financial uncertainty from the Iran war stop a Starmer leadership challenge?

headlines.title: LIVE at Maida Vale studios… How popular is Donald Trump in the US?
headlines.description: And why isn't there more support for Democrats?

headlines.title: Emma Stone and Ryan Gosling star in an award-winning musical
headlines.description: An aspiring actress and a dedicated jazz musician fall in love in modern-day Los Angeles.

headlines.title: A remarkable finale - but will 13 chaotic minutes cost Man City title?
headlines.description: A chaotic 13-minute spell from Man City in the second half of a six-goal thriller at Everton could prove to be the visitors' undoing in the Premier League title race.

headlines.title: The family sacrifices that helped Wu become world champion
headlines.description: Wu Yize discusses the sacrifices made by his family on his journey to becoming China's second world snooker champion.

headlines.title: Foden reaches agreement over new Man City deal
headlines.description: England midfielder Phil Foden reaches an agreement in principle over a new four-year deal at Manchester City.

headlines.title: What now for Rohl's Rangers as title hopes fade?
headlines.description: Rangers' Scottish Premiership title challenge has been undone by two damaging defeats by Motherwell and Hearts. What now for Danny Rohl and his players?

headlines.title: Man City's title hopes dented despite late Doku stunner in six-goal thriller
headlines.description: Jeremy Doku's 97th-minute equaliser salvages a draw for Manchester City in a six-goal thriller at Everton.

headlines.title: Adriano, Samba, R.Larcos - ranking the most iconic video game footballers
headlines.description: Fifa, Pro Evolution Soccer and Football Manager have been among the most popular football video games - but who are the most iconic players from them?
